title: onobrychis micrantha
intro: Onobrychis micrantha, also known as small bird's foot clover or dwarf clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Onobrychis micrantha include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis micrantha can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
